productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Pearl Star Green Flip Flop
description: Style Noteflip flops have been in vogue since time immemorial. The adidas Pearl, true to its name, will add a splash of colour to your beach style and have a good grip, are comfortable, and can be worn with almost any casual staple. We especially love that this pair comes with a removable strap that can be replaced with a floral spare that comes with this pair!Product DetailsBlunt toed flip flop in green with synthetic thong style straps The lateral strap is removable (with a velcro closure) and can be replaced with another strap (that comes with this piece)Soft foamy rubber footbedSingle piece rubber outsole that has herringbone lugsMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
